fundamentals_limitation: fundamentals.csv contains CURRENT SNAPSHOT pe/pb/roe with announce_date = fetch date, NOT historical point-in-time fundamentals. Tencent PE/PB values are current snapshots, not a complete historical fundamentals database. Do NOT backfill these snapshots into historical dates; that would fabricate announce_date and introduce look-ahead bias. When snapshot_fundamentals=False or the quote source is unavailable, fundamentals.csv is header-only and the pipeline continues with a warning (not a failure).
warnings: snapshot_fundamentals=False: fundamentals.csv is header-only by request (--no_snapshot_fundamentals).
fixture_refresh_note: Refreshed from the successful 2026-07-17 standalone-provider smoke test; output and cache paths are repository-relative for portability.
fixture_purpose: Small reproducible real A-share fixture for automated tests and minimal demo; NOT a representative market sample; NOT investment data.
